---
title: "Projects"
---



This section showcases Python-based projects that demonstrate my ability to analyse data, interpret results, and communicate findings through code and visualisations.

::: {.callout-important}
Each project includes **active executable Python code**, structured explanation, and a visual output.
:::

### Student Performance Analysis

A Python project exploring the relationship between study time and grades.

[View Project →](list/project-1.qmd)

---

### Monthly Budget Analysis

A Python project analysing monthly income and expenses through tabular and graphical output.

[View Project →](list/project-2.qmd)
